title: provider-gitlab plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the provider-gitlab semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_TOKEN.description: GitLab API token. In practice this is often sourced from GITLAB_TOKEN.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PROJECT_ID.description: GitLab project ID. If unset, the plugin may derive it from CI metadata.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_MILESTONE.description: Optional milestone name to associate with the release.

SEMREL_TAG_NAME.description: Release tag name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_CHANGELOG.description: Generated release notes or changelog content from semrel core.

SEMREL_BRANCH.description: Release branch name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
